hypotheses.statement: B0 plus no-trade / turnover control can improve net utility by reducing low-value rebalances.
hypotheses.expected_measurable_gain: lower turnover and better medium/high cost-adjusted proxy versus B0
kill_criteria: net utility not improved versus B0
hypotheses.full_backfill_admission_rule: UTILITY_IMPROVED versus B0 under medium and high cost without worse worst-window result
hypotheses.expected_failure_mode: execution cost reduction may also suppress useful rebalance

hypotheses.statement: B0 plus fast asymmetric risk overlay can improve stress and drawdown behavior without excessive recovery lag.
hypotheses.expected_measurable_gain: drawdown and stress proxy improve versus B0 while benchmark-relative result is not WEAK
hypotheses.full_backfill_admission_rule: stress result not WEAK and cost/benchmark not WEAK versus B0
hypotheses.expected_failure_mode: risk overlay improves drawdown only by missing upside

hypotheses.statement: B0 plus slow relative tilt with confidence-shrinkage interface can produce stable allocation value.
hypotheses.expected_measurable_gain: benchmark-relative proxy improves while window stability and signal robustness are not blocked
hypotheses.full_backfill_admission_rule: UTILITY_IMPROVED versus B0 and B1 with stable source attribution
hypotheses.expected_failure_mode: slow tilt may overfit semiconductor-relative window
hypotheses.resource_budget: slow tilt only; shrinkage fields reserved until B5

deferred_direction: complex regime filter combinations deferred until B1-B5 simple modules prove insufficient

reader_brief.summary: 下一阶段只保留 H1/H2/H3 三个简单研究方向，暂不直接研究复杂 regime filter 组合。
reader_brief.blocking_issues: B0 control and H1/B1 execution-control mini-backfill are complete, but B1 evidence is mixed; H2/H3/B2-B6 remain blocked by independent runner, signal robustness and owner/system review requirements.
reader_brief.warnings: Roadmap and B1 mixed evidence are research-only and do not approve candidate v3.
reader_brief.next_action: review B1 mixed evidence before deciding whether to implement H2/B2 or H3/B3
